name: Broccoli & Red Pepper Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 each Sweet red peppers, cut into -thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim off large leaves of broccoli and remove tough ends of lower stalks.
2. Wash broccoli thoroughly; cut florets into bite-sized pieces (reserve the stems for another use).
3. Cook broccoli covered, in a small amount of boiling salted water 2 to 3 minutes or until slightly tender. Drain.
4. Rinse with cold water; drain and set aside.
5. Combine broccoli and peppers in a large mixing bowl; toss gently.
6. Combine remaining ingredients in a jar; cover tightly and shake vigorously.
7. Pour marinade over vegetables, toss gently.
8. Cover and chill overnight.
9. Drain off marinade before serving.
